description: AI-powered portfolio analysis, market research, and client profiling for personalized wealth management advisory

agents.name: Portfolio Analyst
agents.description: Analyzes portfolio composition, risk exposure, asset allocation efficiency, and identifies concentration risks and rebalancing opportunities

agents.name: Market Researcher
agents.description: Researches current market conditions, sector trends, macroeconomic indicators, and identifies emerging investment opportunities

agents.name: Client Profiler
agents.description: Evaluates client risk tolerance, investment objectives, time horizons, and ensures advisory recommendations align with client suitability profiles
